scripts.dev:all-review: dotenv -e ./.env.local -- bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; trap "kill 0" EXIT INT TERM; AGENTS_DIR="${ITON_AGENTS_DIR:-$(cd .. && pwd)/IToN_Agents}"; if [ ! -d "$AGENTS_DIR" ]; then echo "IToN_Agents not found at $AGENTS_DIR"; echo "Set ITON_AGENTS_DIR in .env.local (or shell env) to your local IToN_Agents path."; exit 1; fi; check_port(){ local p="$1"; if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then lsof -nP -iTCP:"$p" -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; elif command -v ss >/dev/null 2>&1; then ss -ltn | grep -q ":$p "; else return 1; fi; }; for port in 3000 3333 3334; do if check_port "$port"; then echo "Port $port is already in use. Stop the existing process and retry."; exit 1; fi; done; npm run studio & npm run app:ai-provider-editor & (cd "$AGENTS_DIR" && npm run server) & wait'
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down && docker volume rm $(docker volume ls -q --filter name=neon_data) && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:reset: docker-compose down && docker volume rm $(docker volume ls -q --filter name=neon_data) && docker-compose up -d
